mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, type, title, content, target_type, target_id, event_key) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{eventKey})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, type, title, content, target_type, target_id, event_key, read_at, deleted_at, created_at FROM notifications WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND read_at IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL
